scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! May I see your passport and booking confirmation?
Do you have a seat preference? Window or aisle?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석 선호가 있으신가요? 창가 아니면 통로?

choices.text: I want to sit on the wing.

scenes.npcDialog: How many bags are you checking in today?

choices.text: I want to check in myself.

scenes.npcDialog: Please place your laptop and liquids in a separate tray.
Please step aside. Do you have anything metal in your pockets?

choices.text: Oh, I forgot my belt. Let me remove it.
I might have some coins. Here they are.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you find something?

choices.text: I'm looking for my gate. It's gate 25.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to see anything in particular?
We're now boarding rows 20 to 35. May I see your boarding pass?
Can I help you find your seat?
Let me help you with your bag. Is this your carry-on?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 가방 넣는 것 도와드릴게요. 이게 기내용 가방인가요?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink? We have juice, water, coffee, and tea.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 음료는 뭘로 드릴까요? 주스, 물, 커피, 차가 있습니다.

scenes.npcDialog: For your meal, would you like beef or chicken?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 식사로 소고기와 닭고기 중 뭘로 드릴까요?

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else I can get for you?

choices.text: Could I get a blanket, please?
I want to sleep in first class.

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, the seatbelt sign is on. Could you wait a moment?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 죄송합니다, 안전벨트 사인이 켜져있어요. 잠시 기다려주시겠어요?

choices.text: Okay, I'll go back to my seat.
I don't care about the sign.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need help filling out the arrival card?

choices.text: Yes, what should I write for 'purpose of visit'?
Where do I write my hotel address?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like headphones for the entertainment system?

choices.text: That would be great, thank you.

scenes.npcDialog: Please return to your seat and fasten your seatbelt. We're experiencing turbulence.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석으로 돌아가 안전벨트를 매주세요. 난기류가 있습니다.

choices.text: Okay, I'll sit down right away.
Is it going to be a rough ride?

scenes.npcDialog: We'll be landing in 30 minutes. Please put your tray table up and seat in the upright position.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 30분 후 착륙합니다. 테이블을 접고 좌석을 바로 세워주세요.

choices.text: Okay, thank you for letting me know.

scenes.npcDialog: Connecting flight? Your gate is in Terminal 3. Follow the signs for international transfers.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환승이세요? 게이트는 터미널 3에 있어요. 국제선 환승 표지판을 따라가세요.

choices.text: Thank you! How much time do I have?

scenes.npcDialog: Please have your boarding pass and passport ready for the security check.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 보안검색을 위해 탑승권과 여권을 준비해 주세요.

choices.text: Do I need to take out my laptop again?
I already did security in Seoul.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like some Chinese food while you wait? We have noodles and dumplings.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 기다리시는 동안 중국 음식 드시겠어요? 면과 만두가 있어요.

choices.text: How long until my next flight?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to Moscow. Your connecting flight to Amsterdam departs from Gate B12.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 모스크바에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 암스테르담행 연결편은 B12 게이트에서 출발해요.

choices.text: Thank you! Is there a place to rest nearby?
How do I get to Gate B12?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to see some Russian souvenirs? Matryoshka dolls are very popular.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 러시아 기념품 보시겠어요? 마트료시카 인형이 인기예요.

choices.text: They look interesting! How much are they?

scenes.npcDialog: What is the purpose of your visit?
How long will you be staying?

choices.text: I'll be here for two weeks.

scenes.npcDialog: Where will you be staying?

choices.text: I'm staying at the Hilton Hotel.
At a hotel in the city center.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have a return ticket?

choices.text: Yes, I'm flying back on the 15th.

scenes.npcDialog: Which carousel is your luggage on?

choices.text: I'm not sure. My flight was from Seoul.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there a problem with your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, my bag hasn't come out yet.
I can't find my suitcase. It's a black one.

scenes.npcDialog: How much would you like to exchange?

choices.text: Can I exchange 300 dollars to euros?

scenes.npcDialog: Today's rate is 1.08 euros per dollar. Is that okay?
How can I help you today?

choices.text: How do I get to the city center?
What's the best way to get downtown?

scenes.npcDialog: Where would you like to go?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a ticket to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Do you have a reservation?

choices.text: Yes, I have a reservation under Kim.
Yes, I booked online. Here's my confirmation.
No, but give me the best room.

scenes.npcDialog: Your room includes breakfast. It's served from 7 to 10 AM.

choices.text: Great, where is the breakfast room?
Perfect, thank you for the information.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else you need?

choices.text: Could you tell me the WiFi password?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to the Van Gogh Museum. Would you like an audio guide?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 반 고흐 미술관에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 오디오 가이드 원하세요?

choices.text: Yes, do you have one in Korean?
I don't care about Van Gogh.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to the Heineken Experience! The tour includes two beers at the end.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 하이네켄 체험관에 오신 것을 환영해요! 투어 끝에 맥주 2잔이 포함되어 있어요.

choices.text: Perfect! How long is the tour?
Great! Is there a brewing demonstration?

scenes.npcDialog: Want to try raw herring the Dutch way? Hold it by the tail!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 네덜란드식으로 생청어 드셔보실래요? 꼬리를 잡고 먹어요!

choices.text: Sure! Is this how locals eat it?
I'll try it! Any tips for a first-timer?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! Are you here to register for our English program?

choices.text: Yes, I'd like to enroll in the intermediate course.
What courses do you offer for beginners?

scenes.npcDialog: We have a study group meeting after class. Want to join?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 수업 후에 스터디 그룹 모임 있어요. 참가하실래요?

choices.text: Yes! What topic are you studying?
Sounds great! What time does it start?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a student monthly pass?
Welcome! You booked a 6-bed dorm, right? Here's your locker key.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영합니다! 6인실 도미토리 예약하셨죠? 여기 락커 키입니다.

choices.text: Yes, that's correct. Where is my bed?
I want a private room now.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need help with the bus?

choices.text: Which bus goes to the old town?
How much is the bus fare?

scenes.npcDialog: Photography is not allowed inside. Please keep your voice down.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 내부 사진 촬영은 금지되어 있어요. 조용히 해주세요.

choices.text: I understand. How long is the tour?
Of course. Where was Anne's room?
Why can't I use my phone?

scenes.npcDialog: This is the Red Light District. Photography of the windows is not allowed.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 여기는 레드라이트 지구예요. 창문 사진 촬영은 금지되어 있어요.

choices.text: I understand. Is it safe to walk around here?
What's the history of this area?
I want to take pictures anyway.

scenes.npcDialog: Fresh stroopwafel! Place it on your hot coffee to warm the syrup.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 갓 구운 스트롭와플이에요! 뜨거운 커피 위에 올려 시럽을 녹이세요.

choices.text: Delicious! Can I buy a box to take home?
Smells amazing! Are these made fresh?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you prefer morning or afternoon classes?

choices.text: Morning classes would be better for me.
What time do afternoon classes start?
I don't want to wake up early.

scenes.npcDialog: The homework is due on Friday. Any questions?

choices.text: Should we work in groups or individually?
Can I email it or should I print it?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to the dormitory. Here's your room key.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 기숙사에 오신 것을 환영해요. 방 열쇠예요.

choices.text: Thank you! Where's the common room?

scenes.npcDialog: The shared kitchen is on the first floor. Do you have any questions?

choices.text: Can I store food in the fridge?
What time does the kitchen close?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you looking for something?

choices.text: Is the museum within walking distance?
How long does it take to walk there?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome aboard! The canal cruise is about one hour.

choices.text: Great! Is there commentary in English?
Can we sit outside on the upper deck?

scenes.npcDialog: This is a coffee shop, not a regular cafe. Do you know the difference?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 여기는 커피숍이에요, 일반 카페가 아니에요. 차이점 아세요?

choices.text: Oh, I heard about Dutch coffee shops. Can I just have a coffee?
I'm just looking around. Is it legal here?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to the diamond factory! Would you like to see how we cut diamonds?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 다이아몬드 공장에 오신 것을 환영해요! 다이아몬드 커팅 과정 보시겠어요?

choices.text: Yes! Why is Amsterdam famous for diamonds?
That sounds interesting! How long does cutting take?
This is just a sales pitch.

scenes.npcDialog: Let me explain our house rules. Quiet time starts at 10 PM.

choices.text: I understand. What about having friends over?

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you today?

choices.text: I'm having trouble with pronunciation. Any tips?
Could you recommend some extra exercises?

scenes.npcDialog: We're organizing a cultural trip this weekend. Interested?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 이번 주말에 문화 여행이 있어요. 관심 있으세요?

choices.text: Sounds fun! How do I sign up?

scenes.npcDialog: Is this your first time at a hostel?

choices.text: Yes, where are the shared bathrooms?
Where can I take a shower?

scenes.npcDialog: We have a free walking tour starting at 10 AM. Interested?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 오전 10시에 무료 워킹투어가 있어요. 관심 있으세요?

choices.text: Yes! How long is the tour?
If it's free, it's probably bad.

scenes.npcDialog: Biking is the best way to see Amsterdam! Which size do you need?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 자전거가 암스테르담 구경하는 최고의 방법이에요! 어떤 사이즈 필요하세요?

choices.text: Medium, please. Do you have a bike lane map?
Is there a helmet? I'm not used to cycling in traffic.

scenes.npcDialog: You can buy a ticket from the machine or tap your card on board.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 기계에서 표를 사거나 탑승 시 카드를 탭하면 돼요.

choices.text: Can I use the same ticket for multiple trams?

scenes.npcDialog: This is the Jordaan neighborhood. It's known for its cozy cafes and boutiques.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 여기는 요르단 지역이에요. 아늑한 카페와 부티크로 유명해요.

choices.text: It's so charming! Any local recommendations?
What's the best street to explore here?
Old neighborhoods are all the same.

scenes.npcDialog: How was your first day at school?

choices.text: It was great! The teachers are really nice.
A bit nervous, but I think I'll enjoy it.
I don't want to talk about it.

scenes.npcDialog: How are you finding your current class level?

choices.text: It's a bit easy. Can I move to a higher level?
I think I need a slower-paced class.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you interested in language exchange?

choices.text: Yes! I can teach Korean if someone helps me with English.
That sounds great! How does it work?

scenes.npcDialog: Your ticket includes only cabin baggage. Do you have checked luggage?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 티켓에는 기내 수하물만 포함되어 있어요. 위탁 수하물 있으세요?

choices.text: How much extra for checked baggage?
I only have carry-on, so I'm fine.

scenes.npcDialog: Cooking tonight? There's a supermarket around the corner.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 오늘 저녁 요리하세요? 코너 돌면 슈퍼마켓 있어요.

choices.text: Great! Do they have fresh vegetables?
Cooking is a waste of time.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to Zaanse Schans! Would you like to see inside a working windmill?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 잔세스칸스에 오신 것을 환영해요! 작동하는 풍차 내부를 보시겠어요?

choices.text: That sounds fascinating! Is it included in the ticket?
I've seen enough windmills in photos.

scenes.npcDialog: The I amsterdam City Card includes free public transport and museum entries.
scenes.npcDialogKo: I amsterdam 시티 카드에는 무료 교통과 박물관 입장이 포함되어 있어요.

choices.text: That sounds great! How many days should I get?

scenes.npcDialog: This is Dam Square, the heart of Amsterdam. That's the Royal Palace.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 여기가 암스테르담의 중심인 담 광장이에요. 저기가 왕궁이에요.

choices.text: Can we go inside the palace?
What's the history of this square?

scenes.npcDialog: Let me show you around. Here's the cafeteria.

choices.text: Great! Is there a library too?
Where can I find the computer lab?

scenes.npcDialog: Congratulations on completing the course! Would you like your certificate?

choices.text: Yes, please! Can I get an official one with a stamp?
Thank you! Will it show my final grade?

scenes.npcDialog: What can I get for you?

choices.text: One kebab, please. How much is it?
What's the cheapest thing on the menu?
Is this food safe to eat?

scenes.npcDialog: Regular admission is 15 euros.

choices.text: Do you have any free admission days?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to try some Gouda? We have aged and young varieties.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 고다 치즈 드셔보시겠어요? 숙성과 생치즈 종류가 있어요.

choices.text: Yes please! What's the difference in taste?
Can I try the aged one? How old is it?

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for tulip bulbs? We ship worldwide!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 튤립 구근 찾으세요? 전 세계 배송 가능해요!

choices.text: Can I bring bulbs into Korea?

scenes.npcDialog: What can I get you? We have local Dutch beers on tap.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 뭘 드릴까요? 현지 네덜란드 맥주가 생맥주로 있어요.

choices.text: What local beers do you recommend?
I'll try a small glass of your best Dutch beer.

scenes.npcDialog: Need any help finding study materials?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 학습 자료 찾는 거 도움 필요하세요?

choices.text: Yes, where are the English grammar books?
How long can I borrow books for?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you here to open an account?

choices.text: Yes, I'm a student here. What documents do I need?
I need an account for my study abroad expenses.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! Would you like a meal or just a sandwich?

choices.text: How much is the value meal?

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for luggage storage?

choices.text: Yes, how much for a small locker?
I'll just leave it on the floor.

scenes.npcDialog: The tulips are in full bloom! Camera ready?

choices.text: This is so beautiful! Which area has the most colorful tulips?
Amazing! Can I buy tulip bulbs to take home?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to try some traditional Dutch food?

choices.text: Yes! What's a typical Dutch dish?

scenes.npcDialog: We need to take your photo for the student ID.

choices.text: Okay, when will the card be ready?

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for a phone plan?

choices.text: Yes, I'm here for 6 months. What are my options?
Do you have any student plans?

scenes.npcDialog: Will that be all?

choices.text: Yes, and can you heat this up for me?
Do you have any meal deals?
This is too expensive for a convenience store.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with anything?

choices.text: I just want WiFi, no food.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you a student? We offer 50% off.

choices.text: That's great! One student ticket please.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with something?

choices.text: Are you hiring? I'm a student looking for part-time work.
I saw your job posting. Is the position still open?
I don't really want to work.

scenes.npcDialog: This souvenir is 20 euros.

choices.text: Can you give me a discount? How about 15?
Just give it to me for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Front desk, how may I help you?

choices.text: The air conditioning in my room isn't working.
I can't figure out how to adjust the temperature.

scenes.npcDialog: Housekeeping, can I help you?

choices.text: Could I get some extra towels, please?
I need more towels for my room.

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! How can I assist you today?

choices.text: Could I get a late checkout?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you checking out today?

choices.text: Yes, I'd like to check out.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like us to store your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, I'll pick it up around 3 PM.
That would be great. My flight is this evening.

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Table for how many?
Are you ready to order?

choices.text: Yes, I'll have the pasta, please.
Could I have a few more minutes?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink?

choices.text: I'll have a glass of water, please.
Could I see the wine list?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have any food allergies?
Can I get you anything else?
How would you like to pay?

choices.text: Can I pay with credit card?

scenes.npcDialog: Where to?

choices.text: Can you take me to this address?

scenes.npcDialog: That'll be 25 euros.

choices.text: Here you go. Keep the change.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a day pass?
I want to ride for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with directions?

choices.text: Does this bus go to the museum?
Which bus goes to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, are you lost?

choices.text: Yes, I'm looking for the train station.
Could you tell me how to get to the museum?

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! Where are you flying to today?

choices.text: I don't want to go home.

scenes.npcDialog: Last minute shopping? Can I help you find something?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 마지막 쇼핑하세요? 뭔가 찾는 거 도와드릴까요?

choices.text: I'm looking for some chocolate as a gift.
Do you have any local souvenirs?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need a customs declaration form?

choices.text: Yes, please. What do I need to declare?
Do I need to declare gifts I bought?
